title: Parabens Group - Canada.ca
content:
These substances were identified for action under the Chemicals Management Plan (CMP). This screening assessment focuses on 7 substances referred to collectively as the Parabens Group.
- Summary of publications
Draft screening assessment
Risk management scope
Proposed conclusion on section 64 criteria
Follow-up activities
Benzoic acid, 4-hydroxy-, methyl ester
Meets one or more of the criteria
Refer to risk management scope
Benzoic acid, 4-hydroxy-, propyl ester
Benzoic acid, 4-hydroxy-, butyl ester
Benzoic acid, 4-hydroxy-, phenylmethyl ester
None planned at this time
Benzoic acid, 4-hydroxy-, ethyl ester
Benzoic acid, 4-hydroxy-, 1-methylethyl ester
Benzoic acid, 4-hydroxy-, 2-methylpropyl ester
Meets one or more of the criteria
Refer to risk management scope
Anticipated publication of the Final Screening Assessment for the Parabens Group and the Proposed Risk Management Approach for Methylparaben, Propylparaben and iso-Butylparaben .
Publication and start of 60-day public comment period on the Draft Screening Assessment for the Parabens Group and the Risk Management Scope for Methylparaben, Propylparaben and iso-Butylparaben . The related notice was published in the Canada Gazette , Part I: Vol. 154, No. 11 .
